title: WM Sets Date for Second Quarter Earnings Release Conference Call
text: HOUSTON--(BUSINESS WIRE)--WM (NYSE: WM) announced that it will release second quarter financial results after the close of the market on Tuesday, July 25, 2023 and host its investor conference call Wednesday, July 26 at 10 a.m. ET. Listeners can access a live audio webcast of the conference call by visiting investors.wm.com and selecting “Events & Presentations” from the website menu. A replay of the audio webcast will be available at the same location following the conclusion of the call.

title: Routeware Announces Acquisition of Compliance Publishing, Expanding Its Solutions for Medical Waste Management
text: PORTLAND, Ore., June 22, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Routeware, a leading provider of integrated technology solutions for the waste and recycling industry, is pleased to announce the acquisition of St. Louis Park, Minnesota based Compliance Publishing, a renowned provider of solutions for medical waste companies. This strategic acquisition strengthens Routeware's product offerings for medical waste haulers, including the ability to manage back-office operations and provide OSHA training and compliance.

title: Waste Management's Focus On Biogas And Recycling Is A Great Plan
text: Waste Management plans to spend a lot of CAPEX to increase its recycling facilities and RNG biogas output. Waste Management has opportunities to increase its efficiency and, thus, margins through robotics. I like a balanced portfolio with safe havens and growth positions. For the former WM is an ideal candidate.

title: Waste Management Should Be On Your Watchlist
text: Waste Management is a solid company with good fundamentals, steady growth, and potential growth opportunities in renewables and recycling. The company faces manageable risks such as competition, inflation, and regulation, but its current valuation leaves no margin of safety. Due to the uncertainty regarding the margin of safety, shares of Waste Management are considered a HOLD.

title: Trash To Cash: Waste Management - Dividends Done Right
text: Waste Management is a compelling investment for conservative dividend growth investors due to its trusted track record as the largest waste management company. WM stands out by capitalizing on sustainability through investments in renewable natural gas and waste-to-energy technology, reducing emissions, and enhancing environmental credentials. With a capital allocation strategy that prioritizes dividends, mergers and acquisitions, and share buybacks, WM offers favorable returns supported by strong financial performance, organic growth, and manageable leverage.

title: Weltmeister International (WM-INTL) : Weltmeister Motor Group (WM) Wenzhou Factory Resumes Operation, the First Batch of Overseas Orders Are Being Dispatched
text: SHANGHAI, June 16, 2023 /PRNewswire/ — Recently, WM-INTL has made an announcement stating that the Wenzhou Factory of WM has resumed its operations in June and has been gradually recovering its production capacity.
